title: En tiempos de Don Porfirio
writer: Juan Bustillo Oro, Humberto Gómez Landero
actors: Fernando Soler, Marina Tamayo, Emilio Tuero
plot: In a Mexican city at the end of the 19th century, Don Francisco, a gambler and a bohemian, almost forgets his wedding and is late. The bride, who is pregnant, is sent to Paris by the snubbed family.
